title: ModernHUD
description: This new mod adds a new tiny little menu utility that provides basic info on your world while not being heavy on FPS!
body:
# ModernHUD - The new information mod, see info at a glance!

With ModernHUD, you can see FPS at a glance without impacting the performance of the game! ModernHUD is a lightweight mod for checking info like FPS, TPS, Coordinates, Yaw, Pitch, etc! The mod can be used to show info easily!

Download ModernHUD today for easy info at a glance!
